Forge module with version.description: Install a specific module version from the Forge

Latest Forge module.description: Install the latest module version from the Forge

Git module by ref.description: Install a Git module using a reference

Git module by commit.description: Install a Git module using a commit

Git module by tag.description: Install a Git module using a tag

Git module by branch.description: Install a Git module using a branch

SVN module by revision.description: Install an SVN module using a revision

Local module.description: Use a module from the local Puppetfile module path
